title: You're Renamon Resourcepack
description: PVP & Survival Resourcepack themed around Renamon from Digimon, Made by Yacu
body:
This is a PVP & Survival Resourcepack themed around Renamon from Digimon and her cute pastel colors!, Mainly light yellow and purple, with some blue accents, making reference to the Digimon Universe, It has different Item references to Digimon, even some that Renamon uses!, and the bow is her paw throwing diamond storms!

Every wool has a pastel color now, so it matches the GUI and the theme in general, 
Beds have a Renamon laying down on it
The Sun an Moon are Renamon
There's Renamon in the GUI, 
Renamon is everywhere!
